case_for: In four of his last six games Stafford has cleared 12 PPR points, including a 22.7-point outburst, showing he has the weekly ceiling to hit this threshold.
case_against: The pregame consensus projection of just 4.9 points is drastically below his recent scoring floor, signaling analysts see a specific reason (matchup or health) for a significant dip similar to his last game's 4.9-point output.
